tasks.title: Create root Bun workspace skeleton
acceptance: Root package.json exists and declares Bun workspaces for apps/* and packages/*.
Workspace directories exist for apps and packages.
No existing v2/TUI source or existing TUI database path is modified.

tasks.title: Add shared package skeleton
acceptance: packages/shared exists with package metadata and TypeScript source entrypoint.
Shared package can export placeholder domain constants/types without importing backend-only code.
Root typecheck includes shared package or documented equivalent.

tasks.title: Add config package with env validation and AUTH_MODE=test
acceptance: packages/config exposes typed env/config loading.
AUTH_MODE=test is supported for deterministic test identity setup.
Config validation rejects missing required env in non-test mode.
Config package does not import db, queue, runtime provider, or web code.

tasks.title: Add backend API service skeleton
acceptance: apps/api exists with Bun/Express service entrypoint.
API exposes basic health endpoint.
API exposes placeholder metrics endpoint or documented stub.
API imports config/shared but does not implement public product APIs yet.

tasks.title: Add orchestrator service skeleton
acceptance: apps/orchestrator exists with Bun service entrypoint.
Orchestrator exposes health/metrics endpoint or documented stubs.
Orchestrator imports config/shared only at this phase.
Orchestrator does not import packages/db or open SQLite.

tasks.title: Add React/Vite web shell
acceptance: apps/web exists with a minimal React/Vite shell.
Web shell can import browser-safe shared types/constants.
Web shell does not import db, queue, runtime providers, or backend-only auth code.

tasks.title: Add db, queue, storage, auth, and runtime package skeletons
acceptance: Package skeletons exist for db, queue, storage, auth, and runtime.
packages/db is clearly backend-owned and not imported by web/orchestrator.
packages/runtime contains provider interface placeholder only, not real E2B logic.
Package entrypoints typecheck.

tasks.title: Add test runner smoke tests
acceptance: bun run test executes at least one deterministic smoke test.
Config/env test covers AUTH_MODE=test and non-test missing env rejection.
Tiny fixture repo path exists or test setup can create it.

tasks.title: Add import-boundary proof
acceptance: There is a lightweight check, test, or documented proof that web does not import db/queue/runtime providers.
There is a lightweight check, test, or documented proof that orchestrator does not import db.
Import-boundary mechanism runs in bun run test or an explicitly documented command.

tasks.title: Add optional Docker Compose skeleton
acceptance: Compose skeleton exists for backend, orchestrator, RabbitMQ, blob/MinIO or local storage, and Prometheus if cheap.
If Compose is deferred, the reason is documented in the Phase 0 implementation note.
Compose skeleton does not require real E2B or paid providers.

phaseAcceptance: Test runner can execute a trivial unit test.
AUTH_MODE=test creates deterministic test operator identity.
Config validation rejects missing required env in non-test mode.
Tiny fixture repo path exists or test setup can create it.
Workspace commands exist or deviations are documented.
Import boundaries are documented and obvious from package layout.
No runtime/provider work is required yet.
preflight: Run git status --short before starting a task.
If modified/untracked files exist outside the task allowedPaths, stop and ask for operator approval.
Never modify v2/ or the existing TUI database during Phase 0.
Commit completed task changes before starting the next task so preflight can validate only the next task diff.
